name: X-Golf Richmond
about: X-Golf Richmond is an indoor golf and entertainment venue featuring six state-of-the-art golf simulators. The facility offers a combination of advanced technology, including camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors, for a realistic and accurate golfing experience. It provides a welcoming atmosphere suitable for players of all skill levels and offers various services such as leagues, lessons, corporate events, and food and beverage options.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for highly accurate shot tracking and analysis
Versatile space suitable for both practice and social events
Relaxed and welcoming atmosphere for all ages and skill levels
Dedicated kiosks with an ultimate entertainment experience
X-League offers competitive team play in a handicapped match play format

food_and_drink.notes: Food and beverage packages available for events and parties
Beer and wine options are available for events and parties

simulator_hardware.notes: Six state-of-the-art simulators developed by X-Golf

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to play at X-Golf Richmond.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: While outside food and drink are not mentioned as permitted, X-Golf Richmond offers food and beverage packages for events and parties.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A recommended simulator time of 3 hours is suggested for tournaments, though for casual play, the time may vary.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Richmond has a relaxed and welcoming atmosphere that makes it perfect for players of all ages, including children.
